basic_details.job_title: SAIL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Consultants Posts
basic_details.short_information: Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL) Consultants (Sports Coach) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of SAIL. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the SAIL Consultants (Sports Coach) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years for all posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma or higher degree in Sports Coaching
qualification.details: Consultants (Sports Coach) - Football: Diploma or higher degree in Sports Coaching from NSNIS or Medal winner/Participation in National/International Sports Events representing India/State. Preferably >15 years coaching experience in Football. Consultants (Sports Coach) - Volleyball: Diploma or higher degree in Sports Coaching from NSNIS or Medal winner/Participation in National/International Sports Events representing India/State. Preferably >15 years coaching experience in Volleyball.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL Consultants (Sports Coach) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the SAIL Consultants (Sports Coach) posts is scheduled for 21st May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the SAIL Sports Coach positions?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Diploma or higher degree in Sports Coaching from NSNIS. Additionally, a medal win or participation in National/International sports events representing India or a state is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Consultants (Sports Coach) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultants (Sports Coach) posts is 64 years. Specific age relaxations are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the SAIL Sports Coach positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 28,000/- to Rs. 36,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultants (Sports Coach) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultants (Sports Coach) posts, with one each for Football and Volleyball.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the SAIL Consultants (Sports Coach) recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the SAIL Sports Coach recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Medical screening.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preference for coaching experience?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with more than 15 years of coaching experience in the respective discipline (Football or Volleyball) are preferably considered.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for SAIL Consultants (Sports Coach) to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SAIL office in Bokaro Steel City, Jharkhand. The exact venue and reporting time will be mentioned in the official notification.
